subcodes.first_line: I implore Thee, O my God, and beseech Thee with lowliness and contrition, before Thy Most Exalted Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لابتهلن الیک یا الهی و اتضرعن بین یدیک متذللا منکسرا الی ملکوتک الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
